title: Organizational Behavior
description: Do you know well about your own personality, your ability or potentials?Do you know well about your friends’ or colleagues’ personality, motives and needs? Are you a good team member in collaborating with others? Have your ever failed to motivate your team members to achieve higher goals? ………This course will help you better understand yourself as well as others. It will help you become a high-performance team member. It will help you motivate your team members to work enthusiastically and to their full potentials. It will help you improve your leadership to achieve organizational goals more effectively.
